name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_BASE
comment: Starting number of HTTP error codes

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_MAX_REDIRECT
comment: The error exceeds the number of HTTP redirects

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_FETCH_HEADER
comment: Error read HTTP header from server

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_INVALID_TRANSPORT
comment: There are no transport support for the input scheme

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_CONNECTING
comment: HTTP connection hasn't been established yet

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_EAGAIN
comment: Mapping of errno EAGAIN to esp_err_t

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_CONNECTION_CLOSED
comment: Read FIN from peer and the connection closed

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_NOT_MODIFIED
comment: HTTP 304 Not Modified, no update available

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_RANGE_NOT_SATISFIABLE
comment: HTTP 416 Range Not Satisfiable, requested range in header is incorrect

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_INCOMPLETE_DATA
comment: Incomplete data received, less than Content-Length or last chunk

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_REDIRECT_DOWNGRADE
comment: HTTPS origin redirected to a non-HTTPS scheme (downgrade blocked)

name: ESP_ERR_HTTP_HEADER_TOO_LONG
comment: A single request header is larger than buffer_size_tx and cannot be sent (only when CONFIG_ESP_HTTP_CLIENT_STRICT_HEADER_BUFFER is enabled)
